The '''Arch of Triumph''' was a landmark erected on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], shortly after [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] instituted the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. The Arch was erected in Palpatine's honor. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], during one of his [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Academy]] training exercises, obtained the fastest time for an assigned run when he went through, rather than over, the Arch.
